overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a character exploring ancient Alexandria at night. The character descends from a grand staircase through a mosaic plaza, passes through a covered colonnade with merchant stalls, and emerges onto a waterfront promenade featuring a large sphinx statue and views of the harbor and lighthouse.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand staircase leading to ceremonial plaza

events.description: character begins descending wide stone staircase from upper terrace
reaches bottom of stairs and transitions to walking on flat mosaic plaza surface

agents.ego_description: walking down grand stone stairs toward open plaza with geometric mosaic flooring

entered.detail: massive decorative ceramic urn with rounded top and handles
intricate black and white geometric tile pattern covering the ground
tall limestone walls flanking the stairs with decorative moldings
tall ancient lighthouse tower visible on the horizon against the night sky
stone pedestals with burning flames providing warm light

segments.scene_description: The character descends a wide ceremonial staircase flanked by stone walls and large decorative urns. The scene opens to a vast plaza with intricate mosaic flooring, while the Lighthouse of Alexandria stands visible in the distant background against the night sky.

events.description: moving from open plaza into tree-lined ceremonial path with columns
approaching columned entrance of the covered structure

agents.ego_description: crossing the mosaic plaza toward a columned walkway lined with cypress trees

notable_agents.action: guard or citizen walking across the plaza in the opposite direction

entered.detail: tall cylindrical limestone columns supporting the structure ahead
tall dark green trees lining the path on both sides
rectangular raised stone beds containing vegetation
tall pointed stone monuments with red banners attached

segments.scene_description: The character walks across the open mosaic plaza toward a distant colonnade, passing between tall cypress trees and stone planters. A lone NPC walks across the plaza in the opposite direction as the character approaches the columned entrance.

events.description: entering covered colonnade with stone columns and overhead roof
exiting covered area back into moonlight toward waterfront

agents.ego_description: walking through covered walkway past merchant stalls displaying pottery and textiles

notable_agents.action: merchant sitting on cushions among goods and large pottery jars

entered.detail: stone ceiling supported by columns providing shelter from sky
wooden shelves and tables displaying trade goods and wares
large blue-green ceramic vessels and amphorae
stacked fabric rugs and textiles piled on the ground
red glowing lights suspended from the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered colonnade supported by massive stone columns, where merchants have set up stalls with pottery, carpets, and textiles. The space is lit by hanging lanterns and torch braziers as the character walks toward the waterfront exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with sphinx statue and harbor view

events.description: exiting colonnade onto waterfront promenade with harbor and sphinx statue
character stops at water's edge to observe the harbor and lighthouse

agents.ego_description: walking along waterfront admiring the harbor, sphinx statue, and distant lighthouse before stopping to look at the water

entered.detail: large stone sphinx lying down with pharaoh headdress and detailed carving
calm dark water reflecting moonlight and torchlight
paved waterfront walkway lined with burning braziers
buildings and ships along the distant harbor front

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the colonnade, the character enters a waterfront promenade featuring a massive recumbent sphinx statue. The harbor stretches out to the right with moonlight reflecting on the water, while the Lighthouse of Alexandria stands prominently in the distance. The character walks along the quay and stops to gaze at the scenic harbor view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a grand ceremonial descent through a bustling market and out toward a moonlit harbor. It begins as the character descends a wide staircase flanked by decorative urns, opening onto a vast plaza with intricate mosaic flooring and the distant Lighthouse of Alexandria silhouetted against the night sky. As the character traverses the open plaza past tall cypress trees and a passing pedestrian, the scene shifts into a covered colonnade where the open air is replaced by massive stone columns and the warm glow of lanterns illuminating merchant stalls. The camera then follows the character through this corridor of pottery and textiles before emerging onto a waterfront promenade dominated by a massive recumbent sphinx. Finally, the view expands across the quay to reveal the harbor's moonlit waters and the prominent lighthouse as the character stops to gaze at the scenic vista.
